evals.name: write-compact-actionable-inline-finding
evals.prompt: Review a PR line where user.email is read immediately after findUser(id), which returns User or null. Write the inline comment for a human teammate.
evals.expected: Anchors the comment to the line, names the reachable null access and crash consequence, proposes the smallest credible guard or missing-user path, avoids labels and throat-clearing, and sounds like a natural teammate rather than a rigid template.

evals.name: expand-high-risk-review-context
evals.prompt: Review a PR that moves authorization for invoice downloads from the server route into a hidden client button. The author is new to the service. Write the actionable feedback.
evals.expected: Explains the server-side authorization boundary and cross-tenant exposure clearly enough for a new author, anchors the issue, requires authorization before object access, names an appropriate regression test, and does not compress the security finding into an ambiguous one-liner or severity emoji.
